description:
The ProjectedRectSlotDriver component takes a Slot in the ``Target`` field and places that slot in the center of where this compoennt's UIX element's transform is. This target slot will be resized to match a pizel scale that the UIX Canvas uses.

}}

fields._position: Internal - The position of the target slot.
fields.Target: The slot to reposition onto this UIX.
fields._rotation: Internal - The rotation of the target slot.
fields._scale: Internal - The scale of the target slot.
fields._originalParent: Internal - The original parent this slot came from.
fields._lastTarget: Internal - The last known slot target this component used.

usage: This can be used if you want to place a slot to where some UIX is at anytime.
